segments.text: But he still makes it back
segments.original_text: さあそれでも帰ってこれる
このソニックというファイターの

segments.text: Up B is strong—incredibly strong! After using that up B,
segments.original_text: 上必殺技強い強い上必殺技使った後に

segments.text: he can do all kinds of follow-ups
segments.original_text: いろんな動きをすることができます

full_text: He's shut down. But he still makes it back. This Sonic fighter's Up B is strong—incredibly strong! After using that up B, he can do all kinds of follow-ups.
